_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4 chip 3b, ckpt 115). Captures (A) the keybind-config ACTION SCANCODES (jump/attack) from the config god-object *0x8a6e80 — read live since there is no static default; the producer 0x46a880 maps slot +0x128 = *(*0x8a6e80+0x558), slot +0x124 = +0x574, slot +0x12c = +0x5c8, each gated by an enable flag (+0x548/+0x564/+0x5b8); the run-vs-walk control mode is +0x510. (B) Arche's body per-Flip (the leader chain, code 0xc35a) — wx/wy/vel/facing/bstate — to read the RUN cap (cmd 5/6 -> higher cap than the walk's 240) and the JUMP arc (wy via body+0x18 vertical vel). (C) 0x478ba0 cmd[0] (filter 0xc35a) to see walk(1/2) vs run(5/6). Drive: nav to freeroam (trace-nav.jsonl) + a DOUBLE-TAP-RIGHT-then-hold held-trace (two up->down ring edges trigger run). RUN: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/freeroam-walk/trace-nav.jsonl --held-trace runs/runjump-gt/runjump-held.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/freeroam_runjump_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames <4540..4900> --run-dir runs/runjump-gt/cap.

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_body
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Leader-chain to Arche's body + the keybind config scancodes. hops = [room_state 0x2784, leader-slot 0x200c, entity 0x9f4, body 0x40].

0x478ba0.name: char_ai
0x478ba0._note: FUN_00478ba0 char AI; filter code==0xc35a. cmd[0] this+0x14854 = 1/2 walk L/R, 5/6 run L/R; cmd[2] +0x1485c (7/8/9), cmd[4] +0x14864 (0xe/0xf jump).
